authority_ceilings: provider contact is authorized for subject emission only — the three r5-slot routes, frozen schedule, frozen prompts, inside the run window
no live target scoring or grader contact authorized
no key-content exposure authorized; the C-beta key remains closed in owner-private custody
spend ceiling USD 8.00 enforced by refuse-before-reservation in the runner; absolute attempt ceiling 344; output cap 768 tokens per attempt
any change to a controlling frozen artifact beyond the authorized additive construction voids this authorization
bounded_unknowns: The live runner does not exist at sealing time; this record authorizes its construction and requires two fresh clean-room receipts at the emission candidate BEFORE any provider contact — the receipts, not this record, attest the construction.

This record cannot prove the 312 emissions will complete inside the window or ceilings; the runner must stop honestly at any ceiling, window close, or ODR-41 trigger, and a partial census is a determinate, reportable outcome.
Provider-side properties (model releases, routes, prices, retention actuals) are outside the repo; the runner records actuals and the ODR-41 stop-rule governs mid-window changes.

authorization_boundaries.real_item_provider_contact_scope: subject-emission-only: the three r5-slot subject routes, within the frozen schedule, ceilings, and the declared run window; no grader contact

authorized_acts: construct the live-capable successor emission runner as ADDITIVE successor construction (new files only; the frozen dry-run path and all frozen artifacts byte-unchanged), enforcing in code: 312 scheduled calls, <=32 transport retries, 344 absolute attempt ceiling, 768 output-token cap per attempt, refuse-before-reservation-exceeds USD 8.00

resolve the owner-sealed emission-actuals deferrals by RECORDING actuals at emission: real subject binding per slot subject-provider-model-routes, provider settings, per-provider tokenizer census, retention/cache disclosures
rebuild CONSTRUCTION-MANIFEST after construction bytes are final; commit the emission candidate; obtain two fresh independent clean-room receipts at that exact candidate before any provider contact
emit the 312 real-item calls to the three frozen subject routes within the run window and ceilings; record the complete call census and evidence; commit

run_window.rule: ODR-41: any subject release, route, wrapper, or price change inside the window => stop + successor freeze

rationale: Owner 312-emission authorization (explicit owner instruction plus AskUserQuestion interview, Claude Code Fable 5 chair session, 2026-07-17, America/Sao_Paulo), issued after the combined preflight returned READY FOR OWNER 312-EMISSION AUTHORIZATION (sealed record validated, candidate a3e4a10, two independent clean receipts, the signed-tip inversion exhibited as the finding of record). The owner sets a 12-hour run window and confirms the sealed scope: additive construction of the live-capable successor runner the prereg contemplates, re-verification at the emission candidate, then the 312 real-item emissions to the three frozen subject routes under the frozen ceilings — with scoring, key exposure, and merge each remaining locked behind their own future sealed acts.
